title: Feature 4: Decisions System in Chat
description: Full-stack new entity: Decision type in schema, StateManager methods, MCP tool (moe.chat_decision), WebSocket handlers, .moe/decisions/ storage, UI with approve/reject buttons in both VS Code and JetBrains, docs update.
definitionOfDone: DecisionStatus and Decision types in schema.ts
MCP tool moe.chat_decision registered and working
VS Code: Decisions rendered inline with approve/reject buttons, gold/yellow styling
JetBrains: Decisions inline with approve/reject JButtons

implementationPlan.description: Schema: Add to `packages/moe-daemon/src/types/schema.ts`: `DecisionStatus = 'proposed' | 'approved' | 'rejected'` type alias. `Decision` interface: `{ id, proposedBy, content, status: DecisionStatus, approvedBy: string|null, channel: string|null, messageId: string|null, createdAt, resolvedAt: string|null }`. Add optional `decisionId?: string` to `ChatMessage`. Add `DECISION_PROPOSED`, `DECISION_APPROVED`, `DECISION_REJECTED` to ACTIVITY_EVENT_TYPES. Error handling: types enforce non-null constraints on required fields.
implementationPlan.note: Added DecisionStatus type alias, Decision interface, optional decisionId to ChatMessage, DECISION_PROPOSED/APPROVED/REJECTED activity events, decisions[] to MoeStateSnapshot. Compile error in StateManager expected - fixed in step 2.

implementationPlan.description: StateManager: Add `decisions` Map field, load from `.moe/decisions/` in `loadState()` using `loadEntities<Decision>()`. Include decisions array in `getSnapshot()`. Add `DECISION_PROPOSED` and `DECISION_RESOLVED` to StateChangeEvent union. Add methods: `createDecision(opts)` generates `dec-{uuid}` id, writes to `decisions/`, optionally posts system message to channel with decisionId linked, emits event + logs activity. `approveDecision(id, approvedBy)` and `rejectDecision(id)` update status/resolvedAt, emit + log. `getDecision(id)` and `getDecisions()`. Error handling: validate decision exists before approve/reject.
implementationPlan.note: Added Decision import, decisions Map field, loadEntities in load, decisions array in getSnapshot, DECISION_PROPOSED/DECISION_RESOLVED StateChangeEvent types. CRUD methods: getDecision, getDecisions, createDecision (with optional channel system message + messageId linking), approveDecision, rejectDecision. All validate state before mutation.

implementationPlan.description: MCP tool: Create `packages/moe-daemon/src/tools/chatDecision.ts`. Tool `moe.chat_decision` with params: `content` (required string), `channel` (optional string), `workerId` (optional string). Validates content non-empty, calls `state.createDecision()`. Returns `{ success, decision }`. Follow existing tool patterns. Register in `index.ts`. Error handling: throw invalidInput for empty content.
implementationPlan.note: Created chatDecision.ts MCP tool with content (required), channel (optional), workerId (optional) params. Validates content non-empty, calls state.createDecision(). Registered in index.ts.

implementationPlan.description: WebSocket + Init + FileWatcher: Add `APPROVE_DECISION`, `REJECT_DECISION`, `GET_DECISIONS` to PluginMessage union in WebSocketServer.ts. Handlers: GET_DECISIONS returns `state.getDecisions()`, APPROVE_DECISION calls `state.approveDecision(id, 'human')`, REJECT_DECISION calls `state.rejectDecision(id)`. Broadcast DECISION events. Add `'decisions'` to dirs in initProject.ts. Add `decisions/*.json` to FileWatcher patterns. Error handling: validate payload, return ERROR for missing fields.
implementationPlan.note: Added GET_DECISIONS/APPROVE_DECISION/REJECT_DECISION to PluginMessage union and handlers in WebSocketServer. Decision events auto-broadcast via emitter. Added 'decisions' dir to init, decisions/*.json to FileWatcher patterns.

implementationPlan.description: VS Code types + client: Add `Decision` interface + `DecisionStatus` to moe.ts. Add `DaemonInboundMessage` types: DECISIONS, DECISION_PROPOSED, DECISION_RESOLVED. Add `PluginOutboundMessage` types: GET_DECISIONS, APPROVE_DECISION, REJECT_DECISION. In MoeDaemonClient.ts: add `onDecisionsReceived`, `onDecisionCreated`, `onDecisionResolved` emitters. Add `requestDecisions()`, `approveDecision(id)`, `rejectDecision(id)` outbound methods. Handle inbound messages. Error handling: null-safe event handling.
implementationPlan.note: Added Decision/DecisionStatus types to moe.ts, decision WebSocket message types (GET_DECISIONS, APPROVE_DECISION, REJECT_DECISION outbound; DECISIONS, DECISION_PROPOSED, DECISION_RESOLVED inbound), DAEMON_MESSAGE_TYPES entries. Added 3 decision emitters, message switch handlers with state cache updates, requestDecisions/approveDecision/rejectDecision outbound methods, and dispose cleanup in MoeDaemonClient.

implementationPlan.description: VS Code webview: Render decisions inline in chat messages. When a message has `decisionId`, render a decision card with gold/amber border, decision content, and approve/reject buttons (if status is 'proposed'). Approved decisions show green checkmark, rejected show red X. Buttons post `approveDecision`/`rejectDecision` messages to extension host. Add corresponding handlers in `handleWebviewMessage()`. CSS: `.decision-card` with gold border, `.decision-actions` button styles. Error handling: gracefully handle missing decision data.
implementationPlan.note: Added Decision import, 3 decision event listeners in constructor, approveDecision/rejectDecision webview message handlers, requestDecisions on ready. CSS: .decision-card with gold/amber border, approve/reject button styles, status colors. JavaScript: decisionMap state, inline decision card rendering in renderMessage (checks msg.decisionId), click handlers for approve/reject buttons, loadDecisions/decisionProposed/decisionResolved inbound handlers with in-place card updates.

implementationPlan.description: JetBrains types + service: Add `Decision` data class to Models.kt with all fields. Add `parseDecision()` to MoeJson.kt. In MoeProjectService.kt: add handlers for DECISIONS/DECISION_PROPOSED/DECISION_RESOLVED inbound messages. Add `requestDecisions()`, `approveDecision(id)`, `rejectDecision(id)` outbound methods. Add listener callbacks. Error handling: safe JSON parsing with defaults.
implementationPlan.note: Added Decision data class to Models.kt with all 9 fields. Added parseDecision() to MoeJson.kt. In MoeProjectService: added Decision import, DECISIONS/DECISION_PROPOSED/DECISION_RESOLVED handlers in message switch, requestDecisions()/approveDecision()/rejectDecision() outbound methods, 3 publish methods, 3 listener callbacks in MoeStateListener interface.

implementationPlan.description: JetBrains UI: In ChatPanel.kt, render decisions inline in message bubbles. When message has decisionId, add a panel with gold/amber border containing decision content + approve/reject JButtons (for 'proposed' status). Approved shows green label, rejected shows red. Buttons call `service.approveDecision(id)` / `service.rejectDecision(id)`. Store decisions in a local map, refresh on DECISION events. Error handling: null checks on decision lookup.
implementationPlan.note: Added decisionId field to ChatMessage model and parser. Added Decision import, decisionsMap field, 3 decision listener callbacks (onDecisions, onDecisionProposed, onDecisionResolved) to ChatPanel stateListener. Added createDecisionCard() method rendering gold-bordered panel with decision content, approve/reject JButtons for proposed status, green/red status labels for resolved decisions. Requests decisions on init.

implementationPlan.description: Docs: Add Decision entity to `docs/SCHEMA.md` — document fields, status values, storage location `.moe/decisions/{id}.json`. Add `moe.chat_decision` tool spec to `docs/MCP_SERVER.md` with params/returns table.
implementationPlan.note: Added Decision entity to SCHEMA.md with full type definition, example JSON, storage layout. Added decisionId optional field to ChatMessage. Added DECISION_PROPOSED/APPROVED/REJECTED to ActivityEventType. Added dec- prefix to ID generation. Added moe.chat_decision tool spec to MCP_SERVER.md with params, returns, and notes.

implementationPlan.description: Test and verify: Run `cd packages/moe-daemon && npm run build`, `cd moe-vscode && npm run compile`, `cd moe-jetbrains && ./gradlew buildPlugin`. Manual test: create decision via MCP, verify inline rendering with approve/reject buttons, approve a decision, verify status updates.
implementationPlan.note: All builds pass: daemon (tsc clean), VS Code (tsc --noEmit clean), JetBrains (buildPlugin SUCCESS). All 293 daemon tests pass (16 test files). No regressions.

reopenReason:
Inline decision rendering is broken — decisionId is never set on ChatMessage, so decision cards never appear in the message stream.

ROOT CAUSE: `sendMessage()` (StateManager.ts:654) accepts `{ channel, sender, content, replyTo? }` but does NOT accept a `decisionId` parameter. In `createDecision()` (line 943-947), the system message is posted without decisionId, so the resulting ChatMessage has no decision link. The UI code checks `msg.decisionId` to render inline cards — this is always undefined, so cards never render.

FIX NEEDED (3 changes):
1. **StateManager.ts:654** — Add `decisionId?: string` to sendMessage() opts type. In the message construction, include `decisionId: opts.decisionId` when present.
2. **StateManager.ts:943** — Pass `decisionId: decision.id` in the sendMessage() call inside createDecision().
3. **moe-vscode/src/types/moe.ts** — Add `decisionId: string | null;` to the ChatMessage interface (JetBrains Models.kt already has it at line 138, but VS Code is missing it).

DoD items failing:
- "VS Code: Decisions rendered inline with approve/reject buttons, gold/yellow styling" — cards never render
- "JetBrains: Decisions inline with approve/reject JButtons" — cards never render

comments.author: architect
comments.content: PRIORITY: User's primary IDE is PyCharm/JetBrains. Implement JetBrains decision UI (inline approve/reject JButtons) FIRST, then VS Code.

failedDodItems: VS Code: Decisions rendered inline with approve/reject buttons, gold/yellow styling
JetBrains: Decisions inline with approve/reject JButtons

issues.description: sendMessage() doesn't accept decisionId param, so ChatMessage never links to Decision. Inline decision cards in both VS Code and JetBrains never render.
createDecision() sendMessage call at line 943 doesn't pass decisionId
ChatMessage interface missing decisionId field (JetBrains Models.kt has it at line 138)
